description: You'll look like the king of fashion in these boots from id while the foamy footbed will keep you comfortable all day. Pair them with distressed jeans, a casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Green and white shoe made of leatherette upper for maximum durability and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug fit Stitch detailing and perforations to enhance shoe life Midsole Full length EVA midsole for comfort and support Cushioned footbed for added comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant textured rubber outsole for better shock absorption Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a nubuck brush to clean the upper Do not store in direct sunlight
